title: Display text in a form based on a condition
excerpt: Is there a way to display a text box based on a condition in forms?  For example, if a user selects Y from the dropdown, I want to add a condition to display the text “Y requests require ABC.”  I see a way to add a quest…

posts.author: elainasmith (Elaina)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to display a text box based on a condition in forms? For example, if a user selects Y from the dropdown, I want to add a condition to display the text “Y requests require ABC.” I see a way to add a question, but not just text by itself (without the data entry field that comes with a question.)

posts.author: Vahid (Vahid Davani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi dear @elainasmith , of course you can, just go to edit the form and then

F#1671×670 21.2 KB

By click on “+ Add another condition” you can continue add different questions for combination of dropdown column or only one
Let me know if you have any other questions
Thanks

posts.author: elainasmith (Elaina)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you but that includes a response box. I am trying to add text without a response box.
